parts.text:
```plantuml
@startuml
title US031 - As Team Member, I want to create a task in a user story

actor TeamMember
participant ": CreateUsTaskUI" as UI
participant ": CreateUsTaskController" as Controller
participant ": Company" as Company
participant "taskTypeStore\n: TaskTypeStore" as TaskTypeStore
participant "taskList\n: List<TaskType>" as TaskTypeList
participant "taskType\n: TaskType" as TaskType
participant "taskTypeNames\n: List<String>" as TaskTypeNames
participant "pStore\n: ProjectStore" as ProjectStore
participant "proj : Project" as Project
participant "sList\n: SprintList" as SprintList
participant "sprint : Sprint" as Sprint
participant "sprintBacklog\n: UserStoryList" as SprintBacklog
participant "us\n: UsTaskList" as UsTaskList
participant "taskList\n: List<Task>" as TaskList
participant "task : Task" as Task
participant "taskNames\n: List<String>" as TaskNames
participant "projectTeam\n: ProjectTeam" as ProjectTeam
participant "projectTeam\n: List<Resource>" as ResourceList
participant "resource : Resource" as Resource
participant "currentResName\n: List<String>" as CurrentResName
participant ": TaskMapper" as TaskMapper
participant "createTaskDTO\n: CreateTaskDTO" as CreateTaskDTO
participant "newUsTask : Task" as NewUsTask

TeamMember -> UI : 1 Ask to create a task of a user story
activate UI
UI -> Controller : 2 getTaskTypes()
activate Controller
Controller -> Company : 3 getTaskTypeStore()
activate Company
Company --> Controller : 4 taskTypeStore
deactivate Company
Controller -> TaskTypeStore : 5 getTaskTypeNames()
activate TaskTypeStore
TaskTypeStore -> TaskTypeNames ** : 6 create()
loop for each know task type
    TaskTypeStore -> TaskTypeList : 7 get(i)
    activate TaskTypeList
    TaskTypeList --> TaskTypeStore : 8 taskType
    deactivate TaskTypeList
    TaskTypeStore -> TaskType : 9 getName()
    activate TaskType
    TaskType --> TaskTypeStore : 10 typeName
    deactivate TaskType
    TaskTypeStore -> TaskTypeNames : 11 add(typeName)
    activate TaskTypeNames
    TaskTypeNames --> TaskTypeStore : 12 true
    deactivate TaskTypeNames
end
TaskTypeStore --> Controller : 13 taskTypeNames
deactivate TaskTypeStore
Controller --> UI : 14 taskTypeNames
deactivate Controller
UI --> TeamMember : 15 Show a list of task types
deactivate UI

TeamMember -> UI : 16 Selects task type
activate UI
UI -> Controller : 17 getUsTasks(projCode, sprintID, usId)
activate Controller
Controller -> Company : 18 getProjectStore()
activate Company
Company --> Controller : 19 pStore
deactivate Company
Controller -> ProjectStore : 20 getProjectByCode(projCode)
activate ProjectStore
ProjectStore --> Controller : 21 proj
deactivate ProjectStore
Controller -> Project : 22 getSprints()
activate Project
Project --> Controller : 23 sList
deactivate Project
Controller -> SprintList : 24 getSprint(sprintID)
activate SprintList
SprintList --> Controller : 25 sprint
deactivate SprintList
Controller -> Sprint : 26 getBacklog()
activate Sprint
Sprint --> Controller : 27 sprintBacklog
deactivate Sprint
Controller -> SprintBacklog : 28 getUsList()
activate SprintBacklog
SprintBacklog --> Controller : 29 usList
deactivate SprintBacklog
Controller -> UsTaskList : 30 getUs(usId)
activate UsTaskList
UsTaskList --> Controller : 31 us
deactivate UsTaskList
Controller -> UsTaskList : 32 getUsTaskList()
activate UsTaskList
UsTaskList --> Controller : 33 usTaskList
deactivate UsTaskList
Controller -> UsTaskList : 34 getTaskNames()
activate UsTaskList
UsTaskList -> TaskNames ** : 35 create()
loop for each know task
    UsTaskList -> TaskList : 36 get(i)
    activate TaskList
    TaskList --> UsTaskList : 37 task
    deactivate TaskList
    UsTaskList -> Task : 38 getName()
    activate Task
    Task --> UsTaskList : 39 taskName
    deactivate Task
    UsTaskList -> TaskNames : 40 add(taskName)
    activate TaskNames
    TaskNames --> UsTaskList : 41 true
    deactivate TaskNames
end
UsTaskList --> Controller : 42 taskNames
deactivate UsTaskList
Controller --> UI : 43 taskNames
deactivate Controller
UI --> TeamMember : 44 Show a list of current tasks\n(to choose a precedence, if want)
deactivate UI

TeamMember -> UI : 45 Selects precedence (optional)
activate UI
UI -> Controller : 46 getCurrentProjectTeam()
activate Controller
Controller -> Project : 47 getProjectTeam()
activate Project
Project --> Controller : 48 projectTeam
deactivate Project
Controller -> ProjectTeam : 49 getCurrentResourcesNames()
activate ProjectTeam
ProjectTeam -> CurrentResName ** : 50 create()
loop for each know resource
    ProjectTeam -> ResourceList : 51 get(i)
    activate ResourceList
    ResourceList --> ProjectTeam : 52 resource
    deactivate ResourceList
    ProjectTeam -> Resource : 53 isCurrent()
    activate Resource
    Resource --> ProjectTeam : 54 result
    deactivate Resource
    alt result = true
        ProjectTeam -> Resource : 55 getName()
        activate Resource
        Resource --> ProjectTeam : 56 resourceName
        deactivate Resource
        ProjectTeam -> CurrentResName : 57 add(resourceName)
        activate CurrentResName
        CurrentResName --> ProjectTeam : 58 true
        deactivate CurrentResName
    end
end
ProjectTeam --> Controller : 59 currentResourcesNames
deactivate ProjectTeam
Controller --> UI : 60 currentResourcesNames
deactivate Controller
UI --> TeamMember : 61 Shows resource list and request data\n(name, description, effortEstimate,\ntaskType, responsible)
deactivate UI

TeamMember -> UI : 62 Choose and typed requested data
activate UI
UI -> Controller : 63 createUsTask(createUsTaskDTO)
activate Controller
Controller -> UsTaskList : 64 createUsTask(createUsTaskDTO)
activate UsTaskList
UsTaskList -> TaskMapper : 65 toModel(createUsTaskDTO)
activate TaskMapper
TaskMapper -> CreateTaskDTO : 66 name = getName()
activate CreateTaskDTO
CreateTaskDTO --> TaskMapper : 
deactivate CreateTaskDTO
TaskMapper -> CreateTaskDTO : 67 description = getDescription()
activate CreateTaskDTO
CreateTaskDTO --> TaskMapper : 
deactivate CreateTaskDTO
TaskMapper -> CreateTaskDTO : 68 effortEstimate = getEffortEstimate()
activate CreateTaskDTO
CreateTaskDTO --> TaskMapper : 
deactivate CreateTaskDTO
TaskMapper -> CreateTaskDTO : 69 taskType = getTaskType()
activate CreateTaskDTO
CreateTaskDTO --> TaskMapper : 
deactivate CreateTaskDTO
TaskMapper -> CreateTaskDTO : 70 responsible = getResponsible()
activate CreateTaskDTO
CreateTaskDTO --> TaskMapper : 
deactivate CreateTaskDTO
TaskMapper -> NewUsTask ** : 71 createTask(name, description,\neffortEstimate, taskType, responsible)
TaskMapper --> UsTaskList : 72 newUsTask
deactivate TaskMapper
UsTaskList -> UsTaskList : 73 saveTask(newUsTask)
activate UsTaskList
UsTaskList -> UsTaskList : 74 validate(newUsTask)
activate UsTaskList
UsTaskList --> UsTaskList : 
deactivate UsTaskList
UsTaskList -> UsTaskList : 75 add(newUsTask)
activate UsTaskList
UsTaskList --> UsTaskList : 
deactivate UsTaskList
UsTaskList --> UsTaskList : 
deactivate UsTaskList
UsTaskList --> Controller : 76 true
deactivate UsTaskList
Controller --> UI : 77 created and saved successfully
deactivate Controller
UI --> TeamMember : 78 created and saved successfully
deactivate UI

@enduml
```
